test-method.name: testCreateNewAssetSuccess
test-method.description: TC-AS01-01: Verify admin can create a new asset with all required fields

exception.message: Cannot locate option with text: Electronics For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception Build info: version: '4.21.0', revision: '79ed462ef4' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21' Driver info: driver.version: unknown
